summary.zh: Hana 现在可以在后台安全准备并原地应用组件更新，同时在异常时自动回退或一键修复。设置页布局、更新历史和新会话输入也得到了一轮系统性整理。
summary.en: Hana can now safely stage component updates in the background and apply them in place, with automatic rollback and one-click repair when needed. This release also brings a systematic cleanup to Settings, update history, and new-session composing.

title.zh: 组件更新可以后台准备、原地应用
title.en: Component updates stage quietly and apply in place

summary.zh: 服务端与界面组件会作为同一份签名更新一起校验和准备，完成后可直接刷新应用，不再让每次组件升级都变成完整安装。
summary.en: Server and renderer components are verified and staged as one signed update, then applied with an in-place refresh instead of turning every component upgrade into a full reinstall.

details.zh: 后台检查只会在完整下载并验证两类组件后，才把更新标记为可应用。
details.en: An update becomes available only after both component sets are fully downloaded and verified.

details.zh: 设置页与侧栏贴纸共享同一套更新状态，稳定版和测试版通道也会保持一致。
details.en: Settings and the sidebar sticker share one update state, with stable and beta channels kept in sync.

sources.title: feat(runtime): ship signed artifact trains and unify settings

title.zh: 更新异常时自动回退，也可手动修复组件
title.en: Automatic rollback and manual component repair

summary.zh: 如果新组件连续启动失败，Hana 会隔离问题版本并回到上一份可用版本；托盘菜单和启动参数也提供了清理并重建组件的修复入口。
summary.en: If new components repeatedly fail to start, Hana quarantines the bad version and returns to the previous working set. A repair action is also available from the tray and command line.

details.zh: 服务端与界面启动都纳入崩溃计数和回退保护。
details.en: Both server and renderer startup are covered by crash counting and rollback protection.

details.zh: 组件清理只回收不再被任何更新通道引用的旧版本。
details.en: Cleanup removes only old component versions that are no longer referenced by any update channel.

sources.title: feat(runtime): ship signed artifact trains and unify settings

title.zh: 更新历史与跨版本公告集中呈现
title.en: A clearer update history across releases

summary.zh: “关于”页面现在可以查看最近五个正式版本的双语更新内容；跨过多个版本升级时，首启公告也会合并展示所有尚未读过的摘要。
summary.en: The About page now shows bilingual notes for the five newest published releases, while first-launch announcements collect every unread digest when an upgrade spans multiple versions.

details.zh: 在线历史读取失败时，会明确回退到安装包内附带的离线历史。
details.en: If online history is unavailable, Hana clearly falls back to the offline history bundled with the app.

sources.title: feat(runtime): ship signed artifact trains and unify settings

title.zh: 国内更新检查优先走加速源
title.en: Faster update checks for users in China

summary.zh: 组件更新会优先尝试国内镜像，并在不可用时自动回到 GitHub；切换稳定版或测试版后，下载、激活和回退都会使用同一通道。
summary.en: Component updates try the domestic mirror first and automatically fall back to GitHub. Stable and beta selection now stays consistent across download, activation, and rollback.

sources.title: feat(runtime): ship signed artifact trains and unify settings

title.zh: 设置窗口和同类组件统一到一套布局纪律
title.en: Settings now follows one consistent layout system

summary.zh: 设置弹窗固定为 884px 外壳，不再随标签页内容改变宽度；卡片、行、开关和分区改用共享原语排列，同时保留原有视觉风格。
summary.en: The Settings window now keeps a fixed 884px shell instead of changing width between tabs. Cards, rows, toggles, and sections share consistent primitives while preserving the existing visual style.

details.zh: 浏览器、界面、Agent、媒体等标签页使用同一内容轨道和间距规则。
details.en: Browser, Interface, Agent, Media, and other tabs now use the same content track and spacing rules.

details.zh: 同类控件的标签、说明文字和右侧操作保持稳定对齐。
details.en: Labels, descriptions, and trailing actions now align consistently across controls of the same type.

sources.title: feat(runtime): ship signed artifact trains and unify settings

title.zh: 新会话草稿、Skill 徽章和发送状态保持一致
title.en: New-session drafts, skill badges, and send state stay in sync

summary.zh: 欢迎页和待创建会话现在都有稳定的草稿身份；恢复草稿或插入 Skill 徽章后，编辑器、发送按钮与实际提交使用同一份内容判断。
summary.en: Welcome and pending sessions now have stable draft identities. After restoring a draft or inserting a skill badge, the editor, send button, and submit path use the same content decision.

details.zh: 纯 Skill 徽章消息不再被当作空消息静默丢弃。
details.en: Skill-badge-only messages are no longer silently treated as empty.

details.zh: 待创建会话发送失败会显示明确提示，而不是没有反应。
details.en: A failed send from a pending session now shows an explicit error instead of doing nothing.

sources.title: feat(runtime): ship signed artifact trains and unify settings

title.zh: 测试版通道不再误删刚激活的组件
title.en: Beta updates no longer delete newly activated components

summary.zh: 组件清理现在会同时保护所有通道正在引用的版本，修复了切换到测试版后，首启可能误删新组件并导致启动失败的问题。
summary.en: Component cleanup now protects versions referenced by every channel, fixing a beta-channel first-launch failure where newly activated components could be removed by mistake.

sources.title: feat(runtime): ship signed artifact trains and unify settings

title.zh: 首次启动准备过程更清楚

summary.zh: 首次安装需要解压和验证组件时，独立启动页会持续显示“准备新家”状态，不再依赖尚未准备完成的主界面资源。
summary.en: While a fresh install extracts and verifies its components, a standalone splash screen keeps showing the preparation state without depending on renderer assets that are not ready yet.

sources.title: feat(runtime): ship signed artifact trains and unify settings
